job_description: We are looking for a Senior Data Scientist with 5+ years of experience in Python, machine learning, and deep learning frameworks (TensorFlow or PyTorch). Strong background in NLP and model deployment required. Experience with cloud platforms (AWS or GCP) is a plus.
Junior Frontend Developer position for a fast-growing startup. Must know React, TypeScript, and CSS. Exposure to REST APIs and Git workflow expected. 0-2 years experience.
DevOps Engineer with hands-on experience in Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD pipelines. Familiarity with Terraform and cloud infrastructure automation (AWS preferred). 3-5 years of relevant experience.
Seeking a Full Stack Engineer proficient in Node.js, React, PostgreSQL, and AWS. Must be comfortable with microservices architecture and Agile development. 3+ years of experience required.

Business Analyst role requiring strong SQL skills, data visualization expertise (Tableau or Power BI), and stakeholder communication abilities. Experience in financial services domain highly desirable.
notes: BA, SQL + BI tools, finance domain

job_description: Machine Learning Engineer to build and maintain production ML pipelines. Must know Python, scikit-learn, MLflow, and have experience with feature engineering and A/B testing at scale. 4+ years experience.
Entry level HR coordinator role. Responsibilities include scheduling interviews, onboarding documentation, and employee record management. No technical background required.
notes: Non-technical HR role — expect low match for DS/SWE candidates

job_description: Python Backend Developer with experience in FastAPI or Django, PostgreSQL, and Redis. Must understand REST API design, async programming, and Docker. 2-4 years experience.

Cloud Architect with 8+ years of experience. Must have hands-on with multi-cloud strategy (AWS + Azure), infrastructure-as-code, and enterprise security frameworks. AWS Solutions Architect certification preferred.
Data Engineer responsible for building and maintaining large-scale ETL pipelines using Apache Spark, Airflow, and Snowflake. Experience with dbt and streaming (Kafka) is a bonus. 3+ years.
Cybersecurity Analyst to monitor, detect, and respond to security incidents. Knowledge of SIEM tools, network forensics, and incident response playbooks required. CISSP or CEH a plus.
Product Manager with 4+ years experience driving B2B SaaS products. Strong ability to write PRDs, lead cross-functional teams, and define roadmap based on customer insights. MBA preferred.
notes: PM role — partial match expected for domain-adjacent candidates

job_description: Android Developer (Kotlin) with 3+ years building consumer-facing apps. Experience with MVVM architecture, Jetpack libraries, and Google Play deployment pipeline.
Blockchain Developer to build smart contracts and DeFi protocols on Ethereum. Proficiency in Solidity, Web3.js, and test-driven development required.
Looking for a receptionist for a small law firm. Must have excellent verbal communication, Microsoft Office skills, and professional telephone etiquette. No legal background required.
notes: Non-technical receptionist — expect very low match for software candidates
